title: Able Strength: Grip Strength in Every Patient's Pocket

seo.title: Able Strength - Self-Serve Grip Strength App | Able Care
seo.description: Clinical-grade grip strength measurement in every patient's pocket. Download, squeeze, compare against normative data and share results with your care team.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Patient using GripAble grip strength sensor
blocks.headline: Grip strength in every patient's pocket.
blocks.subtitle: Self-serve grip strength measurement for patients and residents. Download the app, squeeze the sensor, compare against normative data, share results with your care team.

blocks.heading: Clinical-grade, patient-simple
blocks.body: Able Strength puts grip strength measurement directly in the hands of patients and residents. Connected to the GripAble sensor via Bluetooth, the app captures clinical-grade data in seconds. Patients can track their own progress, set milestones and share results with their care team or family.
blocks.imageAlt: Able Strength app showing grip strength results on a smartphone

metrics.name: Whole-body strength proxy
metrics.description: Grip strength is a validated proxy for overall muscle strength and physical function in adults over 60.

metrics.name: Falls risk indicator
metrics.description: Low grip strength is strongly associated with increased falls risk, frailty and loss of independence.

metrics.name: Mortality predictor
metrics.description: Grip strength predicts all-cause mortality more reliably than systolic blood pressure (Lancet, 2015).

metrics.name: Recovery tracker
metrics.description: Longitudinal grip strength trends track recovery from surgery, illness and deconditioning over time.

steps.title: Download
steps.description: Install the Able Strength app on any smartphone. Pair with a GripAble sensor via Bluetooth.

steps.title: Squeeze
steps.description: Follow the on-screen guide to perform a grip strength test. Three squeezes, 30 seconds.

steps.title: Compare
steps.description: See results instantly, compared against age and sex-matched normative data.

steps.title: Share
steps.description: Send results to your care team, primary care physician or family. Track progress over time with longitudinal trending.

blocks.heading: Put grip strength measurement in your patients' hands.
blocks.body: See how Able Strength integrates with Able Assess for a complete functional health picture.
